description: Sector overlay for French associations, NGOs, foundations, donor-funded bodies, charities, civil-society organizations, and nonprofit documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for NGO. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Law of 1 July 1901 and freedom of association guidance
Declaration and publication of a 1901 association

rules.title: Association-law or nonprofit-governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for loi 1901 association, statutes, object, members, governance, general assembly, or nonprofit purpose evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Law of 1 July 1901 and association guidance

rules.title: Declaration, publication, RNA, or legal-capacity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for prefecture declaration, JOAFE publication, RNA number, legal personality, or capacity evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Declaration and publication of a 1901 association

rules.title: Accounting, donation, subsidy, or financial-governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for accounts, treasurer report, subsidy, donations, audit, budget approval, or financial-governance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Member, donor, beneficiary, or volunteer data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for personal data, donor data, beneficiary records, volunteer/member privacy, GDPR/RGPD, or retention evidence.
